title: Onigashima Moves Toward the Climax
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Big Mom, Law, Unknown person #12 as The raid nears its climax as Zoro and Sanji settle their commander fights while Law and Kid confront Big Mom.
scene: The raid nears its climax as Zoro and Sanji settle their commander fights while Law and Kid confront Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Hah!! Your underlings are begging now...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: You two have really hit rock bottom!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Get it together!! Are you still breathing?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: We have to save the captain!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Quit your bellyaching!! This is a battlefield, you pests!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Now then, I don't think that...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Kaido has let out his usual victory cry yet.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't tell me that puny straw hat brat is still holding out alone...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You better not be playing with your food, Kaido!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Hera!! Take me to the roof!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: pant... pant... like the last attack...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: You barely feel the prick, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: What are you doing? Knock it off!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 47 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
